zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Anne Abbott於1408年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，她的父親Sir John Symond Abbott III26歲，母親Mrs Agnes Abbott23歲。她於1429年與Sir William Cotton在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1473年11月21日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾藍德瓦德享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾藍德瓦德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Anne Abbott于1408年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，她的父亲Sir John Symond Abbott III26岁，母亲Mrs Agnes Abbott23岁。她于1429年与Sir William Cotton在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1473年11月21日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾藍德瓦德享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾藍德瓦德。

nameMeanings.name: Abbott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English abbod, abbot(t), abbat ‘abbot’ (Old English abbod) or Old French abet ‘priest’. Both the Old English and the Old French term are derived from Late Latin abbas (genitive abbatis) ‘priest’, from Greek abbas, from Aramaic aba ‘father’. The nickname was presumably a joking reference to a person's behaviour. In the US, the English name is also sometimes a translation of a cognate or equivalent European name, e.g. Italian Abate , Spanish Abad , or German Abt .

History: George Abbot from Yorkshire, England, settled in Andover, MA, in 1640; he had numerous prominent descendants. George Abbott (probably not the same man) died in Rowley, MA, in 1647. Another early migrant was James Abbott, who came from Somerset, England, to Long Island, NY, in the 17th century.

variants.name: Abate
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Carmelo, Carmine, Gaetano, Vito, Angelo, Canio, Rocco, Sal, Aldo, Carlo.

Italian: from abate ‘priest’ (from Late Latin abbas ‘priest’, genitive abbatis). It could be a nickname, perhaps given to someone who behaved in a priest-like manner, an occupational name for the servant of a priest, or it may denote an (illegitimate) son of a priest. Compare Labate .

variants.name: Abbot
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of Abbott . The spelling with one -t is more typically Scottish than English, and in Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland, this is sometimes an Anglicized form of McNabb .

variants.name: Abbotts
meanings: topographic or occupational name from Middle English (atte) abbotes ‘(at the, of the) abbot's (house or quarters)’, a name for someone who lived or worked at such a place, presumably a servant.
variant of Abbott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Anne Abbott was born in 1408, in London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Symond Abbott III, was 26 and her mother, Mrs Agnes Abbott, was 23. She married Sir William Cotton in 1429, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 21 November 1473, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Anne Abbott est née en 1408, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Symond Abbott III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs Agnes Abbott, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Cotton en 1429, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 novembre 1473, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Anne Abbott 1408 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Symond Abbott III 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs Agnes Abbott 23. Sie hat 1429 in London, England Sir William Cotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. November 1473 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Anne Abbott è nata il nel 1408 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Symond Abbott III, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs Agnes Abbott, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Cotton nel 1429, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 21 novembre 1473, nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Anne Abbottが1408年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir John Symond Abbott IIIは26歳，母Mrs Agnes Abbottは23歳であった。1429年にイギリスロンドンでSir William Cottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1473年11月21日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Anne Abbott(이)가 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Symond Abbott III(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Agnes Abbott(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1429년 영국 런던에서 Sir William Cotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1473년 11월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Anne Abbott nasceu em 1408, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Symond Abbott III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Agnes Abbott, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Cotton em 1429, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1473, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Anne Abbott родилась в 1408 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Symond Abbott III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Agnes Abbott, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Cotton в 1429 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 21 ноября 1473 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.
